upasargachandrika.example_text: 'nApatrapeta praSnezu nAviBAvyAM giraM sfjet' (BA॰SAM॰93.10) nyAyanizWuramuttaraM dadyAdityarTa iti nIlakaRWaH
'ya AtmanA'patrapate BfSaM naraH sa sarvalokasya gururBavatyuta' (BA॰u॰33.121)
'krUreRa nApatrapase kaTaM Sakreha karmaRA' (BA॰u॰9.34) Asu sarvatrodAhutizvapaSabdena nArTaH kaScidupajanyate lajjA sA'patrapAnyata ityamaroktirapi sApavAdA ihEva ya AtmanA'patrapata ityukteH
'na vyapatrapase nIca karmaRA'nena rAvaRa' (rA0 3533) vyapatrapase apatrapase jihrezi lajjase vrIqyasi
